goal: The founder completes the entire discover-to-ride journey on the route plan view on a real iPhone AND a real Android phone against live Convex, with recorded per-platform evidence and no mocks.
block_reason: DISC-007 is the on-device capstone (founder dogfood). Two non-automatable blockers remain: (1) AC-1/AC-2/AC-6/AC-7/AC-8 binding evidence requires the founder's real iPhone + real Android hardware — by design, automation cannot drive real devices. (2) Maestro proxy surfaced a backend data state issue: the dev deployment's top-quality routes (Cherohala Skyway score=90, Wasatch Ridge Traverse score=85, etc.) lack geometryStatus and routeGeometry entirely (they predate the Sprint 02 geometry-backfill feature). AC-1 must_observe requires 'plotted polyline count == 1' — without geometry data, only a centroid pin can render. This routes to convex-implementer as a learned blocker (run the backfill on top-N routes) — out of DISC-007's RN-only WRITE-ALLOWED scope. The in-scope RN work (filter relaxation + fallbacks) is APPROVED and landed.
